def negative_deeply_nested_try_except_beyond_two_levels():
    rule_id = "deeply_nested_try_except_beyond_two_levels"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "try/except blocks nested more than two levels deep, obscuring error propagation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
